chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Revision Application No.S-04 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.01.2026 Mr. Akber Khan Suleman advocate for the applicants. = Mr. Muhammad Tahir Nizamani advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.1, which is taken on record. After arguing the matter at length, learned counsel for the applicants, under instructions, states that he would be satisfied if he would be allowed to agitate his arguments on maintainability and merits of the case before the learned trial Court. Learned D.P.G and learned counsel for the respondent No.1, without prejudice to their right to rebut the same before the learned trial Court, do not oppose. In view of above, instant Criminal Revision Application is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
